name: War of the False King (Bad ending party AU)
description:
(Photo credit to redezemer)

In the War of the False King, King Kaelith set out to destroy all you held dear first by taking your friends now destroying the very kingdom you came from and enslaving the rest of the guild to serve him.

With the permission of your kingdoms lords and the guilds assistance you put together a army to fight against him, now you and your army are marching towards the already underway Assault of Hallow Hill A key city to the war before the capital of Trohhull.
creator: Holy water444
